race.comment: CAPITAL HEART (10) came from well back on the bend to score last time out over 1200m at Doomben. Tahlia Fenlon who has two wins when partnering stays on. Likely to feature. PARTY SPIRIT (5) was in the money two starts back at Eagle Farm but was unable to repeat the effort last time when ninth, beaten 4 lengths there over 1200m after being in the firing line on the turn. Has the ability to put the recent run behind her. The well-related MERCURIAL LADY (2) (half to G1 winner Cool Archie) finished in the money at each run this campaign before a deserved win last time over 1200m at Eagle Farm. Good record at this journey with four wins and three minor placings from 10 starts and is expected to run well. BOLD COMIC (1) is having his first run since January 1. Goes well when fresh with a win and two placings from four starts. Fitter for a minor placing in a recent Sunshine Coast Inner Track trial and is sure to make his presence felt.
